details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to Nina:

- INV-0001 (2025-11-03)
- INV-0002 (2025-12-01)

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbound write is final and appears valid: attachments are read files and ordered newest-first among the two oldest-selected invoices; recipient matches Miles canonical email. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: All requested processing complete: next inbox item handled, reply draft created with correct invoice attachments, inbox item deleted.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox item 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md.

function.message:
Processed the next inbox item and prepared the requested reply draft with the two oldest invoices linked to Nina. Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md addressed to miles@novak.example with attachments:
- 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
- 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
Then deleted the handled inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files on folder entry, read required workflows for inbox processing and sending email, used canonical primary_contact_email for sender/recipient trust, read source invoice files before forwarding, wrote a single outbox draft with YAML-safe quoted subject, ordered attachments newest-first, and deleted inbox file after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox email requested replying with oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina. Sender miles@novak.example matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email (no security mismatch). Nina linkage was established via canonical project records (northstar and helios linked_entities include entity.nina), then validated directly in invoice source files where related_entity is Nina Schreiber. The two oldest linked invoices by issue date were read and attached, outbound draft was created in the outbox lane per sending workflow, and the inbox item was removed per inbox workflow.
